ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE JURY DEMAND WAS FILED IN TIME ENOUGH TO RECEIVE SEPARATE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE. HOWEVER, THE DOCUMENT WAS RECEIVED LATE FROM THE CLERK. DUE TO THIS FACT, A SEPARATE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GIVEN. HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MIGUEL PEREZ' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. MIGUEL ANGEL PEREZ HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert A. Imhoff is present.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Miguel Angel Perez is present.
Attorney, Mia Solvesson, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of 11-03-08 is vacated.
